response: Theme Park Hotel and Genting Highlands are considered tourist attractions and hospitality enterprises located in Genting Highlands, Pahang, Malaysia. Theme Park Hotel is a hotel within the Genting Highlands resort, while Genting Highlands is a hill resort developed by the Genting Group, featuring entertainment parks and hotels. Both businesses are part of the larger Genting Highlands development, which includes the Resorts World Genting complex, a major tourist destination in Malaysia.
